'''zosalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaconiaceous|chaconiaceous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaconiaceous|chaconiaceous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zosalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zosalithi|zosalithi]] || [[word:zosaliji|zosaliji]] || [[word:zosalishi|zosalishi]] || [[word:zosaliki|zosaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zosaluthuthu|zosaluthuthu]] || [[word:zosalujuju|zosalujuju]] || [[word:zosalushushu|zosalushushu]] || [[word:zosalukuku|zosalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zosaluthu|zosaluthu]] || [[word:zosaluju|zosaluju]] || [[word:zosalushu|zosalushu]] || [[word:zosaluku|zosaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zosalufthuf|zosalufthuf]] || [[word:zosalufjuf|zosalufjuf]] || [[word:zosalufshuf|zosalufshuf]] || [[word:zosalufkuf|zosalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zosalethe|zosalethe]] || [[word:zosaleje|zosaleje]] || [[word:zosaleshe|zosaleshe]] || [[word:zosaleke|zosaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zosalothotho|zosalothotho]] || [[word:zosalojojo|zosalojojo]] || [[word:zosaloshosho|zosaloshosho]] || [[word:zosalokoko|zosalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zosalotho|zosalotho]] || [[word:zosalojo|zosalojo]] || [[word:zosalosho|zosalosho]] || [[word:zosaloko|zosaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zosalofthof|zosalofthof]] || [[word:zosalofjof|zosalofjof]] || [[word:zosalofshof|zosalofshof]] || [[word:zosalofkof|zosalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfthĂŻf|zosalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfjĂŻf|zosalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfshĂŻf|zosalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfkĂŻf|zosalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zosalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zosalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zosalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zosalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfthĂŻf|zosalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfjĂŻf|zosalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfshĂŻf|zosalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfkĂŻf|zosalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfthĂŻf|zosalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfjĂŻf|zosalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfshĂŻf|zosalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zosalĂŻfkĂŻf|zosalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zosalĂŠthĂŠ|zosalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zosalĂŠjĂŠ|zosalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zosalĂŠshĂŠ|zosalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zosalĂŠkĂŠ|zosalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zosalathatha|zosalathatha]] || [[word:zosalajaja|zosalajaja]] || [[word:zosalashasha|zosalashasha]] || [[word:zosalakaka|zosalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zosalatha|zosalatha]] || [[word:zosalaja|zosalaja]] || [[word:zosalasha|zosalasha]] || [[word:zosalaka|zosalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zosalafthaf|zosalafthaf]] || [[word:zosalafjaf|zosalafjaf]] || [[word:zosalafshaf|zosalafshaf]] || [[word:zosalafkaf|zosalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zosalasha|zosalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zosalshĂ«sha|zosalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zosalrosha|zosalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zosalmusha|zosalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zosalyasha|zosalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozosalnkshĂ«sha|gozosalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozosalnkrosha|gozosalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozosalnkmusha|gozosalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozosalnkyasha|gozosalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zosasalasha|zosasalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zosasalshĂ«sha|zosasalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zosasalrosha|zosasalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zosasalmusha|zosasalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zosasalyasha|zosasalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozosasalnkshĂ«sha|gozosasalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozosasalnkrosha|gozosasalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozosasalnkmusha|gozosasalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozosasalnkyasha|gozosasalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zesĂŠlasha|zesĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zesĂŠlshĂ«sha|zesĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zesĂŠlrosha|zesĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zesĂŠlmusha|zesĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zesĂŠlyasha|zesĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozesĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|gozesĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozesĂŠlnkrosha|gozesĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozesĂŠlnkmusha|gozesĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozesĂŠlnkyasha|gozesĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zosfalasha|zosfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zosfalshĂ«sha|zosfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zosfalrosha|zosfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zosfalmusha|zosfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zosfalyasha|zosfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozosfalnkshĂ«sha|gozosfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozosfalnkrosha|gozosfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozosfalnkmusha|gozosfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozosfalnkyasha|gozosfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
